creator: matusita@jp.FreeBSD.org
text:
Here is long-awaited update of SKK ports (japanese/skk).
	Most of this work is done by Mr. FUKUSHIMA; I've just
	approved his work and now do a send-pr. Please check this and
	improve our the world-greatest ports.

	Changed:
		japanese/skk is now "meta-ports." All SKK components
		are divided into following four ports.
			= skk-elisp, elisp module of SKK.
			= skk-jisyo, SKK jisyo file.
			= skk-tools, SKK jisyo tools.
			= skkserv, SKK jisyo server.

		This division set us free of choice of SKK components.
		If you wanna use skkinput (japanese/skkinput) as the
		frontend, you don't want to install skk-elisp.

	Not Changed (or not intended):
		Users of japanese/skk ports does not affected with
		this change.

Fix: 

I've putted these files on <URL:ftp://ftp.freebsd.org/incoming/>.
		skk-ports-19981116-skkdiff.patch.gz:
			Gzipped patch for japanese/skk.
			CAUTION: Be aware that there are no files in
			files/patches directory, should be removed.
		skk-ports-19981116.tar.gz:
			Full contents of new ports. To be sure
			the patch contents described above, I'll
			included not only new ports, but also new
			japanese/skk ports.
How-To-Repeat: 
	Update japanese/skk, then import new modules, named
	japanese/{skk-elisp,skk-jisyo,skk-tools,skkserv}.
